JUDGE: R. DONDERO, CLERK: A. HUIE, REPORTER: S. LERSCHEN CAUSE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 504 TO PUT TERMS OF STIPULATION ON RECORD. TRIAL DATE OF APR-29-02 VACATED. NEW TR DATE IS JUN- 24-02. PARTIES STIP TO VACATE DEFAULT AGAINST DEFT ERNEST WOO. DEFT WOO SHALL FILE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT WITHIN 2 WEEKS OF THE FILING OF AN ORDER. DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLTF TO DEFT JASON WONG SHALL BE SERVED ON OR BEFORE MAY-13-02. DISCOVERY CUT OFF SHALL BE 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. PLTF IS TO PREPARE ORDER FOR THE CT'S SIGNATURE.
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-24-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL, CONDITIONS RE CONTINUANCE WERE PUT ON THE RECORD IN 504
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE; TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT OF ERNEST WOO; TO ALLOW ANSWER TO BE FILED; TO RESPOND TO PENDING DISCOVERY; TO SET DISCOVERY CUT OFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, EARL
